facts.name: Facts
facts.extraction_prompt: Extract ALL factual information from this conversation, including: technical details, project information, people and roles, dates and timelines, configuration details, and lessons learned. Extract every discrete fact as a separate record.
facts.consolidation_prompt: When consolidating: merge duplicates keeping the most specific version, preserve dates and identifiers exactly, group related facts without over-summarizing.

preferences.name: Preferences
preferences.description: Captures user work style, communication patterns, and preferences

decisions.name: Decisions
decisions.description: Tracks decisions made and their reasoning

episodes.name: Episodes
episodes.description: Captures discrete events and generates cross-session reflections
